race.comment: FRYE ISLAND (2) is a four-year-old gelding who is having his first run for the Anthony Farrior stable. Hasn't raced since finishing tenth at Turfway Park (Synthetic) three-and-a-half months ago. Hasn't trialled publicly but looks well placed. Expected to go close. DANCING BEAR (8) missed the placings two runs back then did well last start but found one better over 1006m at Gulfstream Park All Weather, beaten only a nose after being prominent at the turn. Has his share of talent. Hard to beat in this suitable race. GO TO BINGO (10) finished tenth at this track and distance at his last appearance five months ago. Worth plenty of thought. CALL ME A CAB (12) returns from a layoff of five-and-a-half months. Worth noting he filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last time in work over 1106m at this track. Yet to win first up but generally runs well with two minor placings from three tries. Definite top-three chance.
